[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Hug'rer''' served as the administrator of the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]]'s [[Ops Post]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Xoemefel]]. The captain was in charge of the NRSS's day-to-day operations.
